accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and verified context (CRA, BLM, dates, GAO letter).

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; CRA framing and BLM identification are accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution disapproves and nullifies the BLM Miles City RMP Amendment rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly explains the rule is nullified under the CRA and shall have no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: This simple CRA disapproval resolution contains no material exceptions or carve-outs.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the rule issuance, passage, and approval dates per the bill text.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the essential operative effect: disapproval and nullification of the specified rule.

objective_tone.why: Neutral, descriptive, with no advocacy or editorializing.

concise.why: Appropriately brief without padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: BLM, GAO, and the Congressional Review Act are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: All dates (Nov 20 2024, June 25/26 2025, Sept 3, Oct 7-8, Dec 11 2025, PL 119-48) match the bill text.
